description_long: This object is a cream-colored ceramic jug used as a flower vase, featuring a single side handle and a subtle relief of a human figure on its front. The jug is filled with a bouquet of artificial red tulips with green stems and leaves, arranged to fan out at the top. The jug has a slightly flared neck and a rounded body, with a matte, slightly rough finish. The handle is robust and smoothly integrated into the jug's body. The relief decoration adds a touch of character and suggests a handcrafted or artisanal style. The overall appearance is rustic and decorative, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A cream ceramic jug with a side handle, relief decoration, and a bouquet of artificial red tulips. The jug has a rustic, matte finish and is used as a decorative vase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jug's handle on the left and a relief of a human figure on the body, with red tulips fanned out above.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle not visible, showing the plain back of the jug and the tulip stems clustered together.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the right, displaying the jug's smooth, rounded body and the tulip bouquet.
description_view_3: Back view with the handle centered, showing the jug's plain surface and the tulip arrangement from behind.
